title: Coneism
description: Ice-cream cones for Neapolitan and its addons.
body:
![CON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea02f2c3c76dde0ad9bd094af852e608f1155da6.png) Inspired by 3D Tankards and 3D Tea, this resource pack turns the ice cream items from Neapolitan and its addons into 3D models. ![coneism1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77ba8e7dccf46fed69bed48e90f51e47ca6dae1c.png) ![coneism2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13bdbe1f8cb0444878d7151d32649aaf35e65d58.png)

Supported addons:

  • Collector's Reap - Lime & Pomegranate Ice Cream
  • Delightful - Salmonberry & Matcha Ice Cream
  • Exquisito - Chorus, Jelly Ring & Zure Berry Ice Cream
  • Seasonals - Beetroot, Pumpkin & Sweet Berry Ice Cream

More compatible content coming soon...
